boss_room_rules: Boss rooms must have a guaranteed entrance and exit doorway.
Boss spawn socket must be near the arena center.
Reward socket should be behind or near the exit route.
Add-spawn sockets should be distributed around the arena edge.
Hazard tiles must not fully block the route from entrance to exit.
Lighting zone should activate on player entry and may change by boss phase.
top_down_readability: Keep central combat floor open and wall silhouette bold from high-isometric camera.
